question_text: Which statement correctly describes the energy store of a hot cup of tea?

options.label: A
options.text: It has kinetic energy because the cup is not moving

options.label: B
options.text: It has thermal energy because the tea is hot

options.label: C
options.text: It has gravitational potential energy because it is above the ground

options.label: D
options.text: It has chemical energy because tea leaves were used

explanation: Thermal energy is the energy of heat stored in an object because of its temperature. A hot cup of tea has thermal energy because it is warm. The other energy stores do not correctly describe a hot cup of tea.
